items.title: The Cannabis Sector's Billion-Dollar Tax Cut
items.description: A federal tax code change is set to boost the profitability of top cannabis operators, transforming their cash flow profile and profitability metrics.

items.title: USA Rare Earth's $2.8B Power Play to Secure the Supply Chain
items.description: USA Rare Earth is establishing an independent rare earth supply chain via a major Brazilian acquisition and a pivotal European processing partnership.

items.title: More Than Just Dirt: Caterpillar Is the AI Stock Nobody Saw Coming
items.description: Caterpillar is transforming from an industrial leader into a key power provider for the AI data center boom and a pioneer in automation technology.

items.title: Ternus the Page: Apple's Engineering Prodigy Takes the Reins
items.description: Apple names John Ternus CEO as Tim Cook steps down, signaling a shift toward hardware innovation and a device-focused AI strategy for AAPL stock

items.title: 3 AI Small-Cap Stocks With Strong Insider and Institutional Buy-In
items.description: Small-cap stocks are getting a boost in 2026 as capital inflows increase, and insiders are also buying, highlighting opportunities for investors.
